reported_speech_commands_requests_all_le.name: reported speech commands requests all levels

questions.question: Choose the command/request pattern: The teacher told us {a1}.
Negative command: She told me {a1}.
Request: He asked Sarah {a1}.
Strong command: The officer ordered them {a1}.
Advice: The doctor advised me {a1}.
Choose object + infinitive: My manager asked me {a1}.
Reported request should avoid quotation marks: She asked him {a1}.
“Help me with my bag.” She asked him {a1}.

a1.answer: to help her with her bag
options: to help her with her bag
to help me with my bag
